steps.title: Use the colon as definition
steps.content: The colon explains the blank: the elements of subak are joined together into a single cohesive unit. The missing word must mean linked together as parts of one system.

steps.title: Match the system meaning
steps.content: Choice A means casual or unofficial, which does not describe how the elements relate. Choice B means not required, which conflicts with the idea of one cohesive unit. Choice C means outdated, which is not the relationship described after the colon. The remaining word means mutually connected. The answer is D.
